project_type: TypeScript Vite + React board game with WebSocket server
test_framework: No test framework exists - no test files found
verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compiles without errors. Run `npm run build` to verify Vite build succeeds.
environment_constraints: Internet available for npm packages. No test framework. Verification is TypeScript compilation only.
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch. Push directly to main.
key_patterns: Game logic is centralized in src/utils/gameLogic.ts (4327 lines). Card data defined in src/types/game.ts (SPRING_CARDS, SUMMER_CARDS, AUTUMN_CARDS). calculateForce function at ~line 3550 handles monster force calculation with special cases for specific monster IDs. Phoenix resurrection pattern: detect kill, gain 1 VP, place back in same province, decrement monsters reserve. Betray mandate does NOT kill - it replaces (returns to reserve). Movement is handled in moveFigures function (~line 3360). War upgrade effects applied in applyWarUpgrades (~line 1994). Server mirrors some logic in src/server/index.ts for online mode (seppuku resolution). Store in src/store/gameStore.ts handles client-side state.
directory_structure: src/types/game.ts - all types and card data constants. src/utils/gameLogic.ts - all game logic functions (4327 lines). src/server/index.ts - WebSocket server with online game handling. src/store/gameStore.ts - Zustand store for client state. src/components/ - React UI. src/i18n/ - translations (en.ts, es.ts).
